title: tetraria quadrangularis
intro: Tetraria quadrangularis, also known as umbrella sedge, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). It has been traditionally used in South African folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Tetraria quadrangularis include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as being used as a diuretic to aid in the treatment of urinary tract infections. Tetraria quadrangularis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
